jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
